mapper.sql: id, title, artist_id, cover_url, description, release_date, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM album WHERE title = #{title} AND artist_id = #{artistId}
SELECT FROM album WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO album (title, artist_id, cover_url, description, release_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{artistId}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{releaseDate})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM album al WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.album_id = al.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY al.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album al WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.album_id = al.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE')

SELECT al.id, al.title, al.artist_id, al.cover_url, al.description, al.release_date, al.created_time, al.updated_time FROM album al LEFT JOIN artist a ON al.artist_id = a.id WHERE (al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.album_id = al.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY CASE WHEN al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, al.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album al LEFT JOIN artist a ON al.artist_id = a.id WHERE (al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.album_id = al.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE')
